title: TEN Framework: Voice AI That Can Actually Be Interrupted
summary: TEN Framework is an open-source framework for building real-time voice AI agents that handle streaming audio, interruptions, VAD, turn detection, STT, LLM, TTS, avatars, telephony, and multimodal workflows. It uses graph-based extensions and TMAN Designer to enable natural conversations with support for user interruption and turn-taking.
writeup: The video covers TEN Framework, an open-source framework from Better Stack's coverage for building real-time voice AI agents. It handles streaming audio, interruptions, voice activity detection, turn detection, STT, LLM, TTS, avatars, telephony, and multimodal workflows. The framework uses graph-based extensions and the TMAN Designer to support natural conversations, including user interruption and turn-taking.
